basic_details.job_title: DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Audiologist, Hospital Worker and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Audiologist, Hospital Worker and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Nilgiris (DHS Nilgiris) has officially released the Audiologist, Hospital Worker and More Posts Recruitment 2026 notification for 14 vacancies in The Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu. Eligible candidates possessing qualifications ranging from 8th Standard to a Bachelor's Degree in relevant disciplines can apply offline on or before 15 June 2026. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractual basis with a monthly salary ranging from ₹11,000 to ₹32,000.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 8th standard to Bachelor's degree in relevant fields.
qualification.details: Radiographer: B.Sc.,/ Diploma in Radiographer Course Hospital Worker: Minimum 8th standard and Must able to read and write in Tamil. Audiologists & Speech Therapists: A Bachelor degree in audiology and speech language pathology/B.SC(Speech and hearing) From RCI Recognized institute Health Inspector: +2 science Group Complete, Health Inspector Training. Lab Technician: Must have passed plus two Examination. Must possess, certificate in Medical Laboratory Technology Course (One Year duration) undergone in any institution recognized by the Director of Medical Education. Must have a good physique, good vision and capacity to do outdoor work. Audio Metrician: High School and Diploma in Audiometrician or equivalent, complete a certificate programme Physio therapist: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) from any recognized university Audiologist: A Bachelor degree in audiology and speech language pathology/ B.SC (Speech and hearing) From RCI Recognized institute.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DHS Nilgiris Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: nilgiris.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DHS Nilgiris Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 15-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for various posts under the District Health Society Nilgiris Recruitment 2026. These positions are available on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Hospital Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Hospital Worker post, the minimum qualification required is an 8th standard pass. Additionally, candidates must be able to read and write in Tamil.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the posts in DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary for the various posts in DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026 ranges from Rs. 11,000/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and its requirements.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and submit it either in person or by speed post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Lab Technician post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Lab Technician post in DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026 is 35 years and below. Specific age relaxation details might be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form for DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form for DHS Nilgiris Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the official website of the District Health Society Nilgiris, which is nilgiris.nic.in.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type offered in this recruitment is contract-based. Candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the various posts announced by the District Health Society Nilgiris.

faq.question: Q9. Which city is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for this recruitment is Ooty, located in the Nilgiris district of Tamil Nadu. The pincode for the location is 643001.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any specific qualifications for the Radiographer post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Radiographer post, candidates must possess a B.Sc. or a Diploma in Radiographer Course. This is a key educational requirement for the position.
